mapper.select:
SELECT member_id AS member_id, name, active, birth_date, grade, warn, mileage_score, reg_dtm, chg_dtm FROM members
AND UPPER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{name}), '%')
AND UPPER(member_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{memberId}), '%')
AND UPPER(grade) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{grade}), '%')
ORDER BY name ASC, member_id ASC
SELECT member_id AS member_id, name, active, birth_date, grade, warn, mileage_score, reg_dtm, chg_dtm FROM members WHERE member_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET mileage_score = #{mileageScore}, chg_dtm = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( member_id, name, active, birth_date, grade, warn, mileage_score, reg_dtm, chg_dtm ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{name}, #{active}, #{birthDate}, #{grade}, #{warn}, #{mileageScore}, #{regDtm}, #{chgDtm} )
